summary: Room item picker delivered: first-visit 2-column tap-to-add grid for each room type, replacing auto-seeding. Inspectors tap items to select, tap again to add multiples, then press Let's Go to bulk-create items.
techStack: React 18 + Vite 5 PWA, React Router v6, Tailwind CSS v3, Dexie.js v4 (IndexedDB), jsPDF 4, Claude Haiku (AI vision), Supabase JS v2 (sync, gated on VITE_SUPABASE_URL), Google Places API (optional), SW cache-first assets
recentChanges: Added pickerItems arrays to all 15 ROOM_PRESETS entries in roomPresets.js
Removed auto-seeding loop from handleAddRoom in InspectionEditor/index.jsx
Added ItemPicker component to RoomEditor — shown on first visit when room has no items
Added PickerCard component — tap to select, tap again to increment count, X to remove
Let's Go button bulk-creates items (auto-numbered if count > 1) and sets pickerDone=true
Skip option available for inspectors who prefer manual item entry
blockers: VITE_ANTHROPIC_KEY not set — AI analysis inactive until .env configured
VITE_SUPABASE_URL + VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY not set — sync inactive until Supabase project created
Client-side API keys need server-side proxy before production (Phase 2)
Rooms/items/photos cloud sync deferred to Phase 2
pickerDone DB field may need Dexie schema version bump if not already in migration
nextSteps: Verify pickerDone field is in Dexie DB schema (add migration if needed)
Test picker on mobile — verify sticky Let's Go button behaviour
Consider custom item input row in picker (like keys card grid)
Phase 2: Supabase project setup (auth, rooms/items/photos cloud sync)
Phase 2: Server-side Anthropic proxy (remove VITE_ANTHROPIC_KEY from client)
Tier gating: PDF watermark removal for paid plans
